description: You are a biologist analyzing C. elegans morphology. Using a GFP channel image (filename containing 'w1') from ~/Fiji_Data/raw/bbbc010/, straighten a curved worm body from head to tail using a width of approximately 80 pixels and a global scale of 2.087 microns/pixel. Save the straightened image to ~/Fiji_Data/results/straighten/straightened_worm.tif. Generate a longitudinal intensity profile of the straightened worm, saving the plot image to ~/Fiji_Data/results/straighten/intensity_profile.png and the raw data to ~/Fiji_Data/results/straighten/profile_data.csv. Document the worm's length in microns and its mean intensity in a report at ~/Fiji_Data/results/straighten/measurements_report.txt.
